_what: Manually verified posted rates. While an entry is unexpired, it beats the derived estimate for that carrier and service. Use this when a posted number is confirmed (carrier page, account quote cross-check) and the derived value disagrees. Each entry expires automatically so a stale override can never linger past the carrier's next adjustment.
_how: carrier + service must match fuel-rates.json exactly. rate is the published percent. expires is the first day the override no longer applies (the carrier's next scheduled adjustment). previous is optional; omit it to suppress the week-over-week change pill rather than show a false comparison.

overrides.source: Posted monthly rate active June 1 to July 5 2026, confirmed by account quote ratio (41.5%) and independent web pull
